title: Claude Oceanus V1-P (Mythos?- FULLY TESTED): I TESTED IT & IT'S ACTUALLY CRAZY!
summary: AICodeKing tested a leaked model appearing as Oceanus V1-P (possibly Mythos) against multiple coding, reasoning, visual, and game tasks using OpenCode benchmarks. The model achieved perfect scores and outperformed Claude Opus 4.8, GPT-5.5, Gemini 3.5 Flash, DeepSeek V4 Pro, and other competitors on these tasks.
